title: System Status stuck on loading
description: The System Status section in the admin dashboard remains stuck on 'Loading...' indefinitely and does not display health check information.

root_cause_potential: JavaScript error preventing status refresh completion
API endpoint /status not responding or returning invalid data
DOM element targeting issue after recent UI changes
Promise rejection not properly handled in refreshStatus() function
Network timeout or connectivity issue to backend
affected_components: System Status display section in admin dashboard

reproduction_steps: 2. Observe System Status section in admin dashboard
3. Note that it shows 'Loading...' and never updates
4. Wait for auto-refresh (30 seconds) - issue persists
5. Click 'Refresh Status' button to test manual refresh
expected_behavior: System Status should display health checks for astra_vector, astra_graph, openai with connected/error status indicators
actual_behavior: System Status section remains stuck showing 'Loading...' text indefinitely

potential_causes.investigation: Check browser console for JavaScript errors and network requests
Test /status endpoint directly via browser or curl
Verify 'health-status' element exists and is accessible

potential_causes.cause: Promise rejection or async handling issue
potential_causes.investigation: Review recent changes to refreshStatus() function

debugging_steps: 1. Open browser developer tools and check console for errors
2. Monitor Network tab during status refresh attempts
4. Verify DOM element with id='health-status' exists
5. Add console.log debugging to refreshStatus() function
6. Check server logs for /status request processing

immediate_fixes.rationale: Determine if backend is responding correctly

immediate_fixes.action: Add error handling and console logging to refreshStatus()
immediate_fixes.rationale: Identify where the JavaScript execution is failing

immediate_fixes.action: Verify DOM element targeting is working correctly
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure UI elements are accessible for updates

immediate_fixes.action: Add user feedback for loading states and errors
immediate_fixes.rationale: Provide better user experience during failures

impact_assessment.user_impact: Medium - Admin dashboard appears broken, affects monitoring capabilities
impact_assessment.functionality_impact: Medium - System health monitoring not available to administrators
impact_assessment.urgency: Medium - Affects admin usability and system monitoring
